notes: Canonical team/role roster for the DA + DQS workload scoring engine. This profile drives team segmentation, deviation calculations, and display tagging in run_audit.py. Update this file (and scoring_config.json dqs_team / other_teams / partial_data / departed / cross_collab / other_roles lists) when the roster changes.

managers.name: Kiara
managers.notes: Co-manages the US Data Analyst team with Josefina.

managers.name: Josefina
managers.notes: Co-manages the US Data Analyst team with Kiara.

managers.name: Auie
managers.notes: Manages the Philippines-based Data Analyst team.

dqs.label: Data Quality Specialist Team
dqs.notes: DQS responsibilities scored separately from DA. DQS also performs QA on source formatting — this is rare and not gated. A separate DQS responsibility sheet is forthcoming; when available, drop it into data/audit/intake/excel/ and it will be picked up automatically.

partial_data.label: [partial]
partial_data.description: Analysts whose full workload is not yet fully charted in the Workload Tracker. Shown in their team table below the separator line but excluded from deviation calculations.

analysts.name: Matthew Jay
analysts.notes: On Team Lincoln. Workload is not fully represented in this tracker yet.

analysts.name: Wayne Allen
analysts.notes: On Team Lincoln. Workload is not fully represented in this tracker yet.

departed.label: [departed]
departed.description: Analysts who have left the company. Still visible in output so reviewers know the Workload Tracker sheet needs to be updated.

analysts.name: Michelle Albea
analysts.notes: Former manager. Responsibilities have been redistributed to other managers. Sheet entries may still reference her — these should be reassigned.

cross_collab.label: [x-collab]
cross_collab.description: Analysts from other teams who cross-collaborate with DA/DQS. Shown in the DQS table for visibility but excluded from team averages.

analysts.name: David Parker
analysts.notes: Primarily on a different team. Cross-collaborates to help DA/DQS teams. Not a full DQS headcount.

other_roles.label: [biz-ops]
other_roles.description: Non-DA/DQS roles that appear in the Workload Tracker. Shown for transparency but excluded from team averages.

analysts.name: Adam Rollings
analysts.notes: Senior Business Operations Analyst. Different role from DA — workload metrics are not directly comparable.

other_teams.label: excluded
other_teams.description: Analysts on entirely external teams (e.g. Team Kennedy). Excluded from all workload output. If they appear in the Workload Tracker sheet, those entries are informational only.
